use_cases: Displaying user lists or member directories in admin dashboards
Showing product catalogs with sortable columns
Rendering financial reports and transaction histories
Presenting structured data in SaaS applications
Building data-rich interfaces for dev tools and analytics platforms
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style table component system with Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, and TableHead sub-components. Supports hover states and row selection for displaying structured data. Clean, flat design suitable for data-heavy interfaces like dashboards, admin panels, and reports.
